title: US Gulf lightering subdued even before hurrican
section_path: US Gulf lightering subdued even before hurrican
section_path_text: US Gulf lightering subdued even before hurrican
summary:
Main
This week, we investigate why Aframaxes entered the port of Ust Luga and then left again to anchor nearby. On the clean side, we look at the implications for higher MR counts in the Pacific at the same time as increased competition from LRs. Over in the West, we discuss why lightering activity in the US Gulf was subdued even before this week's hurricane disruption.
